title: rubus refractus
intro: Rubus refractus, also known as the thorny raspberry or scrambling raspberry, is a type of bramble plant that belongs to the rose family. It is a climbing or scrambling shrub with thorny stems and edible fruits, similar to raspberries, but with a more intense flavor. The medicinal properties of Rubus refractus include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Rubus refractus include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and respiratory infections, as well as to promote wound healing and improve overall well-being.
